meaning: v.滑行,悄悄地走,(时间)消逝,滑翔n.滑行,滑翔,滑移,滑音
examples: The plane managed to glide down to the runway.
That summer was the glide path of our love.
Do you think we can glide down this glacier?
Keep your binoculars handy and watch the flocks as they glide past the floor-to-ceiling windows.
Four-man rowing sculls glide past, oarsmen grunting as the coxswain deftly works the rudder.
